summary: Four tracked MVP legal draft artifacts were created and fresh-verified for privacy policy, terms of use, personal-data consent and financial disclaimer. They remain DRAFT_WAITING_HUMAN_REVIEW and do not approve legal wording, real-data processing, full MVP-03 or the MVP stage.

artifacts.purpose: Draft MVP privacy policy and aggregate-by-default HR/sponsor reporting boundary.
Draft B2B pilot educational Terms of Use without guaranteed outcomes.
Draft personal-data processing consent template without production legality or real-data approval.
Draft educational financial disclaimer excluding personalized investment, tax, credit and legal advice.

cookie_tracking.reason: No active cookie/tracking implementation scope was found in apps/ or packages/ by the builder scan. Cookie policy/banner/tracking consent must be added separately if cookies, web analytics or tracking are introduced.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Four tracked draft artifact paths exist and are referenced in stage evidence.
Each draft includes required metadata and non-approval warning.
Drafts avoid approval, guarantee and personalized-advice claims.
Privacy/consent preserve aggregate HR/sponsor reporting by default.
Cookie/consent is deferred unless active cookies/tracking are proven in current repo scope.
Human-gate record remains WAITING_HUMAN and names exact files.
Full MVP-03, MVP stage and all human gates remain open.
git diff --check excluding raw is clean.
Harness validation run if applicable and alias mismatch recorded honestly.

commands.command: for path in docs/legal/mvp/drafts/{privacy-policy-draft.md,terms-of-use-draft.md,personal-data-consent-draft.md,financial-disclaimer-draft.md}; do test -f "$path" && printf "FOUND %s\n" "$path"; done
rg -n "DRAFT_WAITING_HUMAN_REVIEW|NOT_APPROVED|НЕ УТВЕРЖДЕНО|Version / date|Owner expectation|Required human reviewer expectation|Production use|Scope" docs/legal/mvp/drafts/*.md

rg -n -i "aggregate|агрегирован|HR|sponsor|diagnostic answers|weak zones|exact sums|reflection details|персональные diagnostic answers|индивидуальные weak zones" docs/legal/mvp/drafts/privacy-policy-draft.md docs/legal/mvp/drafts/personal-data-consent-draft.md docs/legal/mvp/drafts/financial-disclaimer-draft.md

(rg -n -i "(гарантируем|гарантированн[а-я]*\\s+(доход|выгод|сбереж|эконом|списан|избав|результат)|безрисков|быстрый доход|юридически одобрен|одобрен[а-я]*\\s+юрист|утвержден[а-я]*\\s+юрист|approved for production|production legal readiness confirmed|разрешен[а-я]*\\s+(обработка|использование)\\s+реальн|это\\s+(персональн|индивидуальн)[а-я ]*(инвестиционн|налогов|кредитн|юридическ)[а-я ]*(совет|рекомендац)|мы\\s+предоставляем\\s+(персональн|индивидуальн))" docs/legal/mvp/drafts/*.md || true) | rg -v -i "(не обещает|не предоставляет|не подтверждает|не разрешает|не является|не утверждает|NOT_APPROVED|НЕ УТВЕРЖДЕНО)"

docs_sync.reason: The frozen product/stage scope already requires these draft artifacts. This slice adds draft legal documents only and changes no behavior, architecture, workflow, API contract, schema or setup/runtime expectation.

diagram.reason: No flow, state machine or cross-module interaction changed.

backend_baseline_preserved.note: No backend, schema, OpenAPI or generated-client file was edited by this docs/legal-draft slice.

tests_not_run.reason: Not required for docs/legal-draft-only slice; backend baseline unchanged and no UI source changed.

fresh_verifier.summary: Fresh verifier PASS confirmed draft paths, metadata, human-gate accounting, privacy boundary, forbidden-claim scans, cookie/tracking deferral, JSON validation and diff check.

verdict.note: Fresh stage_verifier PASS recorded; parent synchronized latest verdict/problems aliases to MVP-03-legal-drafts-001.

known_limitations: Draft wording is not legally approved.
Real employee/customer data processing remains WAITING_HUMAN.
Cookie/banner/tracking policy is deferred unless a future active implementation scope introduces cookies, analytics or tracking.
Full MVP-03, MVP stage and all human gates remain open.
A separate closure audit is required before full MVP-03 can be reconsidered for DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING.

handoff.scope: Separate MVP-03 post-legal-drafts closure audit only if full MVP-03 status should be reconsidered.
verify_focus: Reconcile MVP-03.01 through MVP-03.05 after MVP-03-legal-drafts-001 PASS.
Keep legal/privacy wording and real-data processing as human-gated unless human approval is recorded.
Do not close the MVP stage.
No production code, app/package files, schema, OpenAPI/generated client, UI or prior immutable proof refs were edited by this legal-draft slice.
